'''鈭歜-j-dh''' ('''bajadha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knot|knot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knot|knot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歜-j-dh
|-
! Lemma
| bajadha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bajadhithi|bajadhithi]] || [[word:bajadhiji|bajadhiji]] || [[word:bajadhishi|bajadhishi]] || [[word:bajadhi|bajadhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajadhuthuth|bajadhuthuth]] || [[word:bajadhujuj|bajadhujuj]] || [[word:bajadhushush|bajadhushush]] || [[word:bajadh|bajadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajadhuthu|bajadhuthu]] || [[word:bajadhuju|bajadhuju]] || [[word:bajadhushu|bajadhushu]] || [[word:bajadhu|bajadhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajadhufuth|bajadhufuth]] || [[word:bajadhufuj|bajadhufuj]] || [[word:bajadhufush|bajadhufush]] || [[word:bajadhuf|bajadhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bajadhethe|bajadhethe]] || [[word:bajadheje|bajadheje]] || [[word:bajadheshe|bajadheshe]] || [[word:bajadhe|bajadhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajadhothoth|bajadhothoth]] || [[word:bajadhojoj|bajadhojoj]] || [[word:bajadhoshosh|bajadhoshosh]] || [[word:bajadh|bajadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajadhotho|bajadhotho]] || [[word:bajadhojo|bajadhojo]] || [[word:bajadhosho|bajadhosho]] || [[word:bajadho|bajadho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajadhofoth|bajadhofoth]] || [[word:bajadhofoj|bajadhofoj]] || [[word:bajadhofosh|bajadhofosh]] || [[word:bajadhof|bajadhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bajadh忙th忙|bajadh忙th忙]] || [[word:bajadh忙j忙|bajadh忙j忙]] || [[word:bajadh忙sh忙|bajadh忙sh忙]] || [[word:bajadh忙|bajadh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bajadhathath|bajadhathath]] || [[word:bajadhajaj|bajadhajaj]] || [[word:bajadhashash|bajadhashash]] || [[word:bajadh|bajadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bajadhatha|bajadhatha]] || [[word:bajadhaja|bajadhaja]] || [[word:bajadhasha|bajadhasha]] || [[word:bajadha|bajadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bajadhafath|bajadhafath]] || [[word:bajadhafaj|bajadhafaj]] || [[word:bajadhafash|bajadhafash]] || [[word:bajadhaf|bajadhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bajadhasha|bajadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobajadhasha|gobajadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibajadhasha|gokibajadhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bajadhn眉sha|bajadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobajadhnkn眉sha|gobajadhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibajadhn眉sha|gokibajadhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bajadhsh毛sha|bajadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobajadhnksh毛sha|gobajadhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibajadhsh毛sha|gokibajadhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajadhrosha|bajadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajadhnkrosha|gobajadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajadhrosha|gokibajadhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bajadhmusha|bajadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajadhnkmusha|gobajadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajadhmusha|gokibajadhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bajadhsherasha|bajadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobajadhnksherasha|gobajadhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibajadhsherasha|gokibajadhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bajadhngasha|bajadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobajadhnkngasha|gobajadhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibajadhngasha|gokibajadhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bajadhyasha|bajadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobajadhnkyasha|gobajadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibajadhyasha|gokibajadhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bajadhyamasha|bajadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobajadhnkyamasha|gobajadhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibajadhyamasha|gokibajadhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bajadhn眉sh毛sha|bajadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobajadhnkn眉sh毛sha|gobajadhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibajadhn眉sh毛sha|gokibajadhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajadhn眉rosha|bajadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajadhnkn眉rosha|gobajadhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajadhn眉rosha|gokibajadhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajadhn眉musha|bajadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajadhnkn眉musha|gobajadhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajadhn眉musha|gokibajadhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bajadhsh毛n眉sha|bajadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobajadhnksh毛n眉sha|gobajadhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibajadhsh毛n眉sha|gokibajadhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajadhsh毛rosha|bajadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajadhnksh毛rosha|gobajadhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajadhsh毛rosha|gokibajadhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajadhsh毛musha|bajadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajadhnksh毛musha|gobajadhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajadhsh毛musha|gokibajadhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bajadhron眉sha|bajadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobajadhnkron眉sha|gobajadhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibajadhron眉sha|gokibajadhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bajadhrosh毛sha|bajadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobajadhnkrosh毛sha|gobajadhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibajadhrosh毛sha|gokibajadhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bajadhromusha|bajadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobajadhnkromusha|gobajadhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibajadhromusha|gokibajadhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bajadhmun眉sha|bajadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobajadhnkmun眉sha|gobajadhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibajadhmun眉sha|gokibajadhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bajadhmush毛sha|bajadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobajadhnkmush毛sha|gobajadhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibajadhmush毛sha|gokibajadhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bajadhmurosha|bajadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobajadhnkmurosha|gobajadhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibajadhmurosha|gokibajadhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bajadh|bajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:b忙j忙dh|b忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobajadh|hobajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hob忙j忙dh|hob忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobajadh|hohobajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohob忙j忙dh|hohob忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉bajadh|n眉bajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉b忙j忙dh|n眉b忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉bajadh|n眉n眉bajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉b忙j忙dh|n眉n眉b忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂bajadh|n茂bajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂b忙j忙dh|n茂b忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂bajadh|n茂n茂bajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂b忙j忙dh|n茂n茂b忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubajadh|lubajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lub忙j忙dh|lub忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubajadh|lulubajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulub忙j忙dh|lulub忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libajadh|libajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lib忙j忙dh|lib忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibajadh|lilibajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilib忙j忙dh|lilib忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobajadh|kobajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kob忙j忙dh|kob忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobajadh|kokobajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokob忙j忙dh|kokob忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebajadh|kebajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keb忙j忙dh|keb忙j忙dh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebajadh|kekebajadh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeb忙j忙dh|kekeb忙j忙dh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
